text: Here I stand, caught in the liminal space between quiet anticipation and evolving ideas. In the first scene, a sense of observation and approachability permeates the quiet gathering—do these people ponder as I do? The setting is open, inviting discourse and reflection. Transitioning to the second scene, vibrant with color and text, the exhibition radiates the thrill of discovery and the promise of progress. The words about confusion and innovation echo my own sense of curiosity. I feel alive within these spaces—questioning, reflecting, and subtly participating in the interplay between human thought and collective creation.
